standard.name: Standard Die
standard.description: Standard die carved from ivory, used in roadside games of Wanderer's Dice.

weighted.name: Weighted Die
weighted.description: A die carved from uneven bone, meant for games of chance. Weighted so high-rolls are more frequent.

circus.name: Circus Die
circus.description: A peculiar periwinkle die used for games of chance, that sounds like it has a bell inside. Several of its faces show Jokers in eerie circus masks.

bertunia.name: Bertunia Die
bertunia.description: A variant die used in Bertunia Castle Town. Includes a face for the Knight, arm extended to form a 7, and the Rogue, crouched and bunched up to form a 0.

lantern.name: Lantern Die
lantern.description: A glowing die used in certain variants of Wanderer's Dice. Includes the face of the Bridge - which is able to bridge the climb from high to low sequences.

bone.name: Bonecarved Die
bone.description: A die carved from the bones of the long dead. Many of its faces are carved with the Skull.

skull.name: Skull-Carved Die
skull.description: A die carved from exhumed remains of the long dead. Its faces are carved with the sign of the Skull.

crown.name: Crown Die
crown.description: A golden jewel-encrusted die. Includes the face of the Crown - which is able to crown any hand to raise its standing.

decadent.name: Decadent Die
decadent.description: A haunted die carved from funerary gold and haunted by the dead. Two of its faces are carved with the Crown - and four with the Skull.

crude.name: Crude Die
crude.description: A die crudely carved from bone using unsophisticated methods. Half its faces are Blank.

blank.name: Blank Die
blank.description: A die crudely carved from vulcanic rock. All its faces are Blank.

priest.name: Priest's Die
priest.description: A die blessed by the Wanderer's clergy. One face bears the sign of the Priest.

dragon.name: Dragon Die
dragon.description: A die carved from dragon scale. Two faces bear the mark of the Dragon.

magician.name: Magician's Die
magician.description: A die carved from enchanted wood. Two faces bear the sign of the Magician.

crystal.name: Crystal Die
crystal.description: A die formed inside a glowing crystal cluster, still faintly warm. Three of its faces bear the sign of the Priest.
